<<The pen is mightier than sword>>  
create table movie_data (title varchar(255), director varchar(255));  
insert into movie_data values ('The Dark Knight', 'Christopher Nolan'), ('Inception', 'Christopher Nolan'), ('Interstellar', 'Christopher Nolan'), ('The Shawshank Redemption', 'Frank Darabont'), ('The Lord of the Rings', 'Peter Jackson');  

select title, director, length(title) as title_length, length(director) as director_length  
from movie_data  
order by title_length desc, director_length desc;  

the query sorts the titles in descending order of their length and, for ties, sorts the directors in descending order of their length.  

the palindrome in the response is: "abba"  

the pen is mightier than sword
